rulings.Case Title: REGINA M. THOMSON VS. THOMAS HARRIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 6, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT THOMAS HARRIS' Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED in the amount of $527.50 for costs and $26,887.50 for reasonable attorneys' fees. Requested fees and costs are collectable as costs incurred in enforcing judgment. (Code Civ. Proc., § 685.040.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL CARMIGNANI VS. YVETTE CARMIGNANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Yvette Carmignanis Notice Of Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Don Carmignani At Deposition; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 6, 2015, line 2 DEFENDANT YVETTE CARMIGNANI's Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Don Carmignani At Deposition and Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Request for Sanctions is denied per Code Civ. Proc., § 2025.480. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH WAKIM VS. FAY MALOUF VASSILAKIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 6, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT FAY VASSILAKIA and LAMIS MALOUF's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. On March 4, 2015, Moving Party was ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than March 13, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving Party failed to comply with Court's order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 6, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT DIANA GONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR per moving party's request and reported that the matter has settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MAGUIRE VS. JOSEPH CONNELLY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Joseph Connelly To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 6, 2015, line 7. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH MAGUIRE's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Joseph Connelly To Respond To Form Interrogatories, And Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions GRANTED subject to opposition. Defendant failed to provide timely responses to requested discovery. (See Code Civ. Pro., §§ 2030.290, 2033.280.) Defendant is to pay sanctions in the amount of $1,695. = (501/REQ)
